-- Policy: gdpr_compliance_policy (Ranger ID: 304)
-- Type: ROW_FILTER | Principal: marketing_team
-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
-- Row Filter for: marketing_team
-- Original expression: consent_given = TRUE AND data_retention_date > CURRENT_DATE()

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION `main`.`customer_360`.rf_customers_marketing_team(consent_given STRING, data_retention_date STRING)
RETURNS BOOLEAN
RETURN IF(
  IS_ACCOUNT_GROUP_MEMBER('marketing_team'),
  consent_given = TRUE AND data_retention_date > CURRENT_DATE(),
  TRUE  -- Allow access for principals not matching the condition
);

ALTER TABLE `main`.`customer_360`.`customers`
SET ROW FILTER `main`.`customer_360`.rf_customers_marketing_team ON (consent_given, data_retention_date);
